_comment: Permanent dedup memory for Natasha Cagle's weekday job screen. Independent of Ace's ledger. Any job whose key OR any url appears here has ALREADY been posted to her board and must NEVER appear again. Key = lowercased normalized company + ' | ' + normalized title (NO location). Append new entries each run; never delete.

entries.key: hims & hers | director talent acquisition operations & enablement
entries.title: Director, Talent Acquisition Operations & Enablement

entries.title: Senior Human Resources Business Partner

entries.title: Lead Talent Acquisition Partner, Advanced Manufacturing
